_comment: Allowed launch destinations shown on the portal after full auth. These are the ONLY things a partner/investor can reach. Edit URLs to match the target server (staging 2.25.68.216 or prod 72.61.193.184). Copy to destinations.json to activate; destinations.json falls back to this file if absent.
